creator: rfg-freebsd@tristatelogic.com
text: As requested, I have now provided screen shots of CUPS Administration page (print preview) as rendered by Firefox 67.0 on both (a) Ubuntu 18.04 / Linux and also, for comparison, the same screen shot of the same page from Firefox 67.0 running on FreeBSD 12.0-RELEASE.  I believe that the differences should be self-evident from these two screen shots, and that the latter should provide the requested objective evidence of the issue/problem.
